name: CRM Sync

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, message: 'Lead synced to CRM', leadId: $json.leadId }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ success: false, message: 'Not a lead, skipped' }) }}

notes: Replace 'https://your-crm.com/api/leads' and 'YOUR_CRM_API_KEY' in the 'Push to CRM' node with your actual CRM endpoint and API key. Supported: HubSpot, Salesforce, Zoho, Pipedrive, or any REST API.
